name: Dr Funmi Obembe
role: Head of School of Technology at University of Northampton
quote: NN1 Dev Club has had a tremendous positive impact on our students who have engaged with the meetups. It has given them valuable opportunities to connect with local developers, hear directly from people working in industry, and build confidence in seeing themselves as part of the wider tech community. For these students, the meetups have helped bridge the gap between university study and professional practice. They have been able to ask questions, develop their networks, and gain insight into real career pathways in software development and related areas. This kind of local, accessible industry engagement is incredibly valuable, and we are grateful for the role NN1 Dev Club is playing in supporting and inspiring our students.
